## Discovery: Example Feature

**Status:** Approved
**Created:** 2026-01-15

## Summary

Sample discovery with sign-off.

## Problem Statement

Teams need a way to record formal approval of pipeline artefacts without
requiring git access or engineer involvement.

## Proposed Solution

A web UI that allows non-technical stakeholders to sign off on artefacts
using their GitHub identity.
